UserPromptSubmit.command: node -e "const t={CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:'${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}',COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT:'${COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT}',COPILOT_VSCODE_PLUGIN_ROOT:'${COPILOT_VSCODE_PLUGIN_ROOT}',PLUGIN_ROOT:'${PLUGIN_ROOT}'};const tok=Object.entries(t).find(([,v])=>v&&!v.startsWith('${'));const env=['COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT','COPILOT_VSCODE_PLUGIN_ROOT','CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT','PLUGIN_ROOT'].map(k=>[k,process.env[k]]).find(([,v])=>v);const r=(tok&&tok[1])||(env&&env[1]);if(!r){console.error('[rad-orc-vscode] no plugin-root resolved. tokens received:',JSON.stringify(t),' env keys matching /PLUGIN|COPILOT|CLAUDE|VSCODE/i:',Object.keys(process.env).filter(k=>/PLUGIN|COPILOT|CLAUDE|VSCODE/i.test(k)).join(','),' cwd:',process.cwd());process.exit(2)}const n=process.platform==='win32'&&r[0]==='/'&&r[2]==='/'?r[1].toUpperCase()+':'+r.slice(2):r;console.error('[rad-orc-vscode] resolved plugin root via',(tok?'token '+tok[0]:'env '+env[0]),'->',n);import('node:url').then(u=>import(u.pathToFileURL(n+'/hooks/bootstrap.mjs').href))"

SessionStart.command: node -e "const t={CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:'${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}',COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT:'${COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT}',COPILOT_VSCODE_PLUGIN_ROOT:'${COPILOT_VSCODE_PLUGIN_ROOT}',PLUGIN_ROOT:'${PLUGIN_ROOT}'};const tok=Object.entries(t).find(([,v])=>v&&!v.startsWith('${'));const env=['COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT','COPILOT_VSCODE_PLUGIN_ROOT','CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT','PLUGIN_ROOT'].map(k=>[k,process.env[k]]).find(([,v])=>v);const r=(tok&&tok[1])||(env&&env[1]);if(!r){console.error('[rad-orc-vscode] no plugin-root resolved. tokens received:',JSON.stringify(t),' env keys matching /PLUGIN|COPILOT|CLAUDE|VSCODE/i:',Object.keys(process.env).filter(k=>/PLUGIN|COPILOT|CLAUDE|VSCODE/i.test(k)).join(','),' cwd:',process.cwd());process.exit(2)}const n=process.platform==='win32'&&r[0]==='/'&&r[2]==='/'?r[1].toUpperCase()+':'+r.slice(2):r;console.error('[rad-orc-vscode] resolved plugin root via',(tok?'token '+tok[0]:'env '+env[0]),'->',n);import('node:url').then(u=>import(u.pathToFileURL(n+'/hooks/drift-check.mjs').href))"
